fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-4 has been unstable since Monday; root cause still under investigation
DevNet 5 will relaunch with same spec as devnet-4; no scope increase until two weeks of stability
Builder API changes (produce block V4) targeted for devnet-6, after devnet-5 stability achieved

client_updates.highlight: Lodestar fork-choice bug confirmed: missed payload_data_is_available check in should_extend_payload, causing self-reorg
Watchtower rolling all images simultaneously likely cascaded the devnet-4 failure; fix in progress
EL PR 764 closed in favor of 793 (Marius's SSE engine API rethink); all teams asked to implement 793

testing_progress.highlight: New Disruptor tool merged into Kurtosis; enables configurable short/long-range reorgs and network forks
Potuz flagged potential cross-client PTC attestation bug: clients may not correctly set data-available flag before deadline

eip_discussions.highlight: EIP-8148 (Custom Sweep Threshold for validators) presented for Hegota; allows configurable auto-withdrawal threshold between 32–2048 ETH for 0x02 validators
EIP-8080 (exits use consolidation queue): intent to DFI; decision deferred two weeks
EIP-8061 (increase exit/consolidation churn): already implemented and tested since devnet-1; intent to SFI in two weeks
EIP-7688 (SSZ stable containers): remains CFI; no SFI until stable devnets achieved

organizational.highlight: EPF cohort-7 starting soon; teams invited to submit project ideas
ACDC #180 will trial a 3-hour earlier time slot (11:00 UTC) to accommodate AEST participants; reverts to current time for #181 unless permanently adopted

action_items.action: CL teams: notify Potuz when dual-deadline and honest-reorg features are implemented for PTC fork-choice testing
Client teams review EIP-8148 (custom sweep threshold) before next ACDC; bring data on affected Lido validator count
Potuz to open Prysm PR for EIP-8045 (exclude slashed validators from proposing)

decisions.decision: Adopt Marius's SSE engine API PR (#793) over Barnabas's (#764); faster JSON-RPC deprecation path at Hegota
Deposit limit: no change now; wait for stable containers; bump constant only if stable containers are DFI'd
ACDC #180 will trial 11:00 UTC start; #181 reverts to current time unless permanently changed

targets.target: EIP-8061 SFI decision at next ACDC (two weeks)
EIP-8080 DFI decision at next ACDC (two weeks)
